macros.rationale: Protein: 2.5 g/kg lean mass (cutting, BF% known, omnivore). Fat: ~20% of calories (diet-mode aware; no somatotype tweak). Carbs: remainder of calorie budget unless constrained by diet mode (gluten_free).

recommendations: Plan is usable; continue improving fibre metadata and rotate recipe sources for adherence.

weekly_meal_plan.name: 7-day gluten_free protocol meal plan

meals.name: Joe Ohrablo's Protein Oatmeal Pancakes Recipe
ingredients: 20 grams of carbs from fruit (banana, blueberries or strawberries)
meals.recipe:
Mix all ingredients into a pancake batter, adding a tiny bit of water to make it easy to mix
Spray nonstick pan with cooking spray
Cook until brown on each side
Throw on cinnamon for extra taste
Top with sugar free syrup if desired

meals.name: Healthy Chili Recipe
ingredients: 2 lbs lean ground beef (80%) or turkey
meals.recipe:
Brown ground beef or turkey
Place meat in soup kettle with all ingredients
Season with salt and pepper
Optional additions: diced jalapenos, green chilies, ranch dressing seasoning packet, or salsa
If chili is too thick, add water as needed
Cook until thoroughly heated

meals.name: Quick & Easy Protein Brown Rice Pudding Recipe
meals.recipe:
Combine brown rice, almond milk, butter, cinnamon and vanilla in a medium pot.
Bring to a slow simmer.
Add protein powder and remaining milk.
Mix over low heat until thick and creamy.
Serve warm or refrigerate.

meals.name: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 420 degrees
Cook pasta 2 minutes shy of directions
Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

meals.name: Coconut Cashew Keto Fried Chicken Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add the cashews into a food processor and pulse until coarse dust is formed. Add the coconut flakes, garlic, salt, paprika, and parsley. Pulse once again to combine. Transfer to a medium bowl.
In a separate bowl mix the egg, coconut milk, and water mixture. Mix together by whipping with a fork or with a hand blender until fully incorporated. Add a pinch of salt and black pepper.
Coat chicken by soaking first in the egg-coconut milk mixture. Dip chicken in the egg mixture followed then by cashew mixture, fully coating both sides of each piece and shaking off any excess. Transfer to a holding plate until all chicken pieces are fully coated.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat, and add the coconut and avocado oil and allow to heat for 1-2 minutes. Carefully add the breaded chicken to the skillet using tongs by placing the chicken away from you to avoid hot oil from splashing and burning you. Cook until browned on each side and warmed through (about 3-4 minutes per side).

meals.name: Beef Chop Suey Recipe
meals.recipe:
In a large nonstick frying pan add olive oil and beef, cook until brown. Do not overcook or beef goes tough
In a second pan, add olive oil, cabbage, celery, mushrooms, water chestnuts, soybean, vinegar and onion
Cook until entire mixture is hot and onions have softened
Add soy sauce, beef stock and cooked beef
Cook this mixture for 5-10 minutes

meals.name: Healthy High Protein Jumbo Apple Muffin Recipe
ingredients: Liquid Egg Whites (enough to make a thin batter, about 0.5-0.75 cup)
meals.recipe:
Mix everything except apple in microwave safe bowl
Let stand for a couple minutes so coconut flour absorbs moisture
Stir then add the apple
Stir again and microwave for 8-9 minutes

meals.name: Bodybuilders' Steak & Grilled Cheese Sandwich Recipe
ingredients: 2 slices reduced fat pepper jack cheese
8 oz thinly sliced sirloin tip steak
meals.recipe:
Season meat and cook as desired
Add peppers and onions to medium skillet and cook until tender
Layer steak, veggies and cheese onto bread
Top with additional bread slice
Heat medium skillet or grill pan over medium heat
Add sandwich to pan and toast until golden
Flip and toast until cheese is fully melted

meals.name: Kurt Weidner's Sweet Potato Waffles Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Blend until smooth
Pour mixture into a waffle maker, heat and serve

meals.name: Tuna, Avocado and Tomato Recipe
ingredients: 150g pre-cooked cannellini or lima beans, rinsed and drained
meals.recipe:
Brush tuna steak with olive oil and grill or dry-fry about 3 mins on each side until outside is golden but inside still pink
Steam or microwave asparagus tips until just tender
Halve tomatoes, squeeze out pips then chop roughly
Arrange beans on serving plates with tomato, asparagus, and onion
Peel and slice avocado, add to plates
Mix together oil, lemon juice, most of oregano and seasoning
Pour most of dressing over salad, slice tuna and add
Drizzle remaining dressing and garnish with rest of oregano

meals.name: No-Bake Gluten-Free High Protein Energy Bites Recipe
ingredients: 2 Tbsp Maple Syrup or Raw Honey
meals.recipe:
In large bowl, combine oats, ground chia, hemp seeds, cacao powder, protein powder, cinnamon and sea salt
Add in almond butter, maple syrup, vanilla and optional mix-ins, mix until just combined
Scoop 1 tbsp of mixture and roll between hands into ball
Place on cookie sheet and repeat until all mixture is used (makes about 20-28)
Place cookie sheet in refrigerator for about 30 minutes to set
Store in airtight container in refrigerator for up to 1 week

meals.name: Summer BBQ Pulled Pork & Coleslaw Sandwiches Recipe
meals.recipe:
Cook pork with BBQ sauce until tender.
Combine coleslaw, greek yogurt, mustard, salt & pepper.
Divide pork among 4 rolls.
Top with coleslaw and serve warm.

meals.name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Chip Protein French Toast Recipe
meals.recipe:
Preheat pan or griddle to medium/high heat
Whisk together egg, protein powder, cinnamon, and milk
Soak each slice of bread in egg mixture on each side
Cook french toast on each side about 3 minutes or until golden brown
Heat peanut butter until melty
Drizzle over french toast and sprinkle with mini chocolate chips

meals.name: Low-Fat, High-Protein Vegetarian BBQ Cobb Salad Recipe
ingredients: 0.5 cup low-sodium black beans, drained and rinsed
meals.recipe:
Cook TVP according to package directions
Mix TVP with BBQ sauce
Add lettuce and veggies to salad bowl
Top with TVP and BBQ mixture
Top with salad dressing of choice or additional BBQ sauce

meals.name: The Bounce-Back Protein Smoothie Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add all ingredients into a blender
Mix for 30 seconds

meals.name: Sega Wat (Spicy Ethiopian Beef Stew)
ingredients: 2 pounds boneless beef chuck, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
3 cups chunky pureed onions (pulse in food processor to form a chunky paste)
4 hard-boiled eggs, shelled and pierced all over with a fork 1/4 inch deep
meals.recipe:
Heat 3 tablespoons of niter kibbeh or butter in a heavy pot or Dutch oven. Add the onions and cook, covered, over low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the garlic, ginger, and 1 tablespoon niter kibbeh and continue to cook for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the berbere and the 2 remaining tablespoons of niter kibbeh and cook, covered, over low heat for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the beef, broth, salt and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low...
Adjust the seasonings, adding more berbere according to taste and heat preference. Add the hard-boiled eggs and simmer on low heat, covered, for another 10 to heat through. Half or quarter the eggs and arrange on the plates with the stew. Serve hot with Ethiopian injera, bread or rice.*This stew is even better the next day after the flavors have had more time to meld.

meals.name: Protein Pumpkin Pancakes With Oats Recipe
ingredients: Topping: 2 tsp peanut flour mixed with water until syrupy
meals.recipe:
Blend the eggs, protein powder, oats and pumpkin together until smooth
Cook like pancakes on a nonstick griddle over medium heat
Flip when bubbles form on surface
Mix peanut flour with water to make syrupy topping
Serve topped with peanut flour syrup

meals.name: Smokey Grilled Cheddar And Chipotle Burger Recipe
meals.recipe: Mix beef with salt, pepper, chipotle powder and coffee. Form into 8 patties. Grill until cooked, top with cheese. Serve in bun with onion and BBQ sauce.

meals.name: Low Carb Bacon Cheddar Ranch Potato Salad
meals.recipe:
Add cauliflower florets to a large pot and cover with water
Bring to a boil and boil 7-8 minutes until fork tender
Drain cauliflower and set aside
In a bowl combine Greek yogurt, ranch seasoning and salt and pepper
Gently mix yogurt into cauliflower until coated
Mix in shredded cheddar cheese and crumbled bacon
Finish with chives if desired
Serve right away or refrigerate until ready to use

meals.name: doro wat - Ethiopian chicken curry
ingredients: 6 boneless skinless chicken thighs cut into 3 pieces per thigh.
2 tbsp Ethiopian berbere (- increasingly available at specialty food shops. If salt is listed in the first 4 ingredients keep looking.)
2/3 tsp kosher salt (- use a bit less if you are using table salt)
2 tbsp garlic ginger paste (- see notes)
meals.recipe:
The onion paste
doro wat

meals.name: Snickerdoodle Pecan Protein French Toast Sticks
meals.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Cut each slice of bread into thirds.
Whisk together egg whites, milk, protein powder.
Coat each slice of bread in the egg mixture.
Bake for 9 minutes, flip, bake 9 more minutes.

meals.name: Grilled Sausage and Turkey Flatbread Pizza Recipe
ingredients: 0.25 cup assorted colored bell peppers, sliced
meals.recipe:
Heat grill to around 300 degrees
Place each flatbread top side down and grill until crispy
While bread is grilling, cook ground turkey breast in a skillet until cooked through
Once bread is crispy, flip over and top each flatbread with half the sauce, ground turkey, sausage, bell peppers and cheese
Close grill cover and continue to grill until cheese is melted
Enjoy right away!

meals.name: Game Day Buffalo Chicken Sliders Recipe
ingredients: 2 lbs boneless skinless chicken breast, cooked and shredded
1/4 cup reduced fat blue cheese dressing
meals.recipe:
Combine shredded chicken, wing sauce and ranch seasoning in mixing bowl and toss until coated
Place a small lettuce leaf on each roll
Top with shredded buffalo chicken
Finish off with a drizzle of blue cheese dressing

meals.name: Easy Paleo Chili Beef Recipe
ingredients: 2 cups diced tomato, canned, juice drained and ¼ cup reserved.
meals.recipe:
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Combine all the seasoning spice mix ingredients in a separate bowl, with the exception of salt.
Dice the onion and keep in a bowl. Heat oil over medium-high in a pot large enough to hold all ingredients. Once the oil is shimmering and slightly smoking, add the onions, mix constantly to prevent onions from burning. Reduce heat to medium and cook onions for 3-5 minutes or until they start to develop a caramelized color. Use your best judgment on the timing. Once some caramelization begins to happen, add bell peppers and garlic and mix to cook for 2 minutes, avoiding the garlic from burnin...
Add the spice mix to the pot and mix to fully coat all the vegetables. The point of this step is to bring the fragrant tones of the spices up. After a few seconds, add canned tomatoes by crushing them with your hand as you add them to the pot, or by crushing them with a wooden or metal spoon in the pot. Mix and scrape any brown bits from the pan. Add ¼ cup of tomato juice, plus water or stock and increase the heat to bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to medium-high and maintain an ag...
Immediately add the ground beef along with honey, and mix to incorporate. Bring the pot back up to an aggressive simmer, mixing constantly, for about 3 minutes or until beef is heated through. Add extra water or stock if the sauce is becoming too thick.
Taste for seasoning and adjust as needed. Use your best judgment in the heat adjustment.
Portion around 5-6 ounces of chili into 4 bowls. There may be excess chili as the volume increases with the addition of all other ingredients (so you may have to weigh a bit more than 6 ounces).
Garnish each bowl with your preferred condiments or garnishes (chives, cheese, tortilla strips, and even fried shallots are some of my favorites).

meals.name: Low Carb, High Protein Breakfast Pizza Eggs Recipe
ingredients: Pizza seasoning or Italian Herbs to taste
meals.recipe:
Coat a 9 inch skillet with nonstick spray
Whisk together egg, egg whites, zucchini, coconut flour and pizza seasoning
Pour mixture into pan and set over medium heat
Cover pan and cook until eggs are set and edges become slightly golden
Top with pasta sauce and grated cheese

meals.name: Protein-Packed Smoky Bison Chili Recipe
ingredients: 1 lb ground bison (can sub ground beef or turkey)
1 can kidney beans, drained and rinsed
0.25 to 0.75 cup water or beef broth
meals.recipe:
Coat bottom of large pot with oil or nonstick spray
Saute chopped onion, garlic, and bacon for 2 minutes until onion becomes slightly translucent
Add in bison and cook 3-4 minutes
Add in fire roasted tomatoes, tomato sauce and all seasonings
Simmer 2-3 minutes
Stir in unflavored protein powder
Mix in kidney beans
Add water or broth until desired thickness
Add in liquid smoke
Allow to simmer 30 minutes
Serve topped with Greek yogurt, shredded cheddar and fresh chives

meals.name: Nichole Ohrablo's Super Shake Recipe
meals.recipe:
Add all ingredients to blender
Blend until smooth
Serve and enjoy

meals.name: Doro Wat Ethiopian Chicken Stew
ingredients: 3-3½ pounds (1.3-1.6kg) chicken, (cut in pieces (or chicken thighs))
3 tablespoons (42g) spiced butter, (or more (sub with cooking oil))
4-6 large eggs, (soft boiled and shells removed)
meals.recipe:
Season chicken with, salt, and pepper. Set aside.
Heat a large pot over medium heat, and when it's hot, add spiced butter and onions. Sauté onions, stirring frequently, until they are deep brown - 7-10 minutes.
After the onions are caramelized or reach a deep brown color, add some more oil, followed by the Berbere spice, garlic, and ginger.
Stir for about 2-3 minutes for the flavors to blossom and the mixture has a deep rich brown color. Be careful not to let it burn.
Then add about 2-3 cups water. Add chicken, tomato paste, paprika, basil, salt, and cook for about 30 minutes.
Throw in the eggs and lemon juice; thoroughly mix to ensure that the eggs are immersed in the sauce.
Continue cooking until chicken is tender about 10 minutes or more.
Adjust sauce thickness and seasoning with water or broth, lemon, salt according to preference.
Serve warm.

target_macros.rationale: Protein: 2.5 g/kg lean mass (cutting, BF% known, omnivore). Fat: ~20% of calories (diet-mode aware; no somatotype tweak). Carbs: remainder of calorie budget unless constrained by diet mode (gluten_free).

water_guidance: Aim to be peeing clear by noon.
Have five clear urinations a day.
Don't be dehydrated at the time of your workouts.
Taper water toward the end of the day so you don't wake to pee.

protocol_notes: Calories are matched by portion scaling at the day level.
Protein is scored during meal selection, but add a lean protein side if a day falls short.
Diet/allergen filters are hard constraints; cuisine preference is a soft adherence preference.
Use weekly average adherence, weight, and measurements before changing calories.
Fruit/veg target: 2 cups fruit and 2 cups vegetables daily; fibre target ~23 g/day.

Portion around 5-6 ounces of chili into 4 bowls. There may be excess chili as the volume increases with the addition of all other ingredients (so you may have to weigh a bit more than 6 ounces).
Garnish each bowl with your preferred condiments or garnishes (chives, cheese, tortilla strips, and even fried shallots are some of my favorites).

ingredients: 6 boneless skinless chicken thighs cut into 3 pieces per thigh.
2 tbsp Ethiopian berbere (- increasingly available at specialty food shops. If salt is listed in the first 4 ingredients keep looking.)
2/3 tsp kosher salt (- use a bit less if you are using table salt)
2 tbsp garlic ginger paste (- see notes)
alternatives.recipe:

doro wat

alternatives.recipe:

Cook french toast on each side about 3 minutes or until golden brown

Coat each slice of bread in the egg mixture.
Bake for 9 minutes, flip, bake 9 more minutes.

Layer steak, veggies and cheese onto bread
Top with additional bread slice
Heat medium skillet or grill pan over medium heat
Add sandwich to pan and toast until golden

alternatives.name: Low Carb Bacon Cheddar Ranch Potato Salad
alternatives.recipe:
Add cauliflower florets to a large pot and cover with water

Drain cauliflower and set aside

Finish with chives if desired
Serve right away or refrigerate until ready to use

alternatives.recipe:
Combine brown rice, almond milk, butter, cinnamon and vanilla in a medium pot.
Bring to a slow simmer.

Mix over low heat until thick and creamy.
Serve warm or refrigerate.

alternatives.selected: Summer BBQ Pulled Pork & Coleslaw Sandwiches Recipe

alternatives.name: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 420 degrees
Cook pasta 2 minutes shy of directions
Drain pasta and return to pot
Add milk, seasonings, cottage cheese and Greek yogurt to pasta
Slowly mix in white cheddar cheese and half of parmesan
Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

alternatives.name: Easy Paleo Chili Beef Recipe
ingredients: 2 cups diced tomato, canned, juice drained and ¼ cup reserved.
alternatives.recipe:
Microwave the Trifecta beef patties covered completely by a damp paper cloth towel, for a minute and a half. Remove from microwave and after the patties are slightly cooled down, crumble the patties to its original form - ground beef - with your hands into a separate bowl. Keep warm.
Combine all the seasoning spice mix ingredients in a separate bowl, with the exception of salt.
Dice the onion and keep in a bowl. Heat oil over medium-high in a pot large enough to hold all ingredients. Once the oil is shimmering and slightly smoking, add the onions, mix constantly to prevent onions from burning. Reduce heat to medium and cook onions for 3-5 minutes or until they start to develop a caramelized color. Use your best judgment on the timing. Once some caramelization begins to happen, add bell peppers and garlic and mix to cook for 2 minutes, avoiding the garlic from burnin...
Add the spice mix to the pot and mix to fully coat all the vegetables. The point of this step is to bring the fragrant tones of the spices up. After a few seconds, add canned tomatoes by crushing them with your hand as you add them to the pot, or by crushing them with a wooden or metal spoon in the pot. Mix and scrape any brown bits from the pan. Add ¼ cup of tomato juice, plus water or stock and increase the heat to bring to a boil. Once boiling, reduce heat to medium-high and maintain an ag...
Immediately add the ground beef along with honey, and mix to incorporate. Bring the pot back up to an aggressive simmer, mixing constantly, for about 3 minutes or until beef is heated through. Add extra water or stock if the sauce is becoming too thick.
Taste for seasoning and adjust as needed. Use your best judgment in the heat adjustment.
Portion around 5-6 ounces of chili into 4 bowls. There may be excess chili as the volume increases with the addition of all other ingredients (so you may have to weigh a bit more than 6 ounces).
Garnish each bowl with your preferred condiments or garnishes (chives, cheese, tortilla strips, and even fried shallots are some of my favorites).

alternatives.name: Beef Chop Suey Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
In a large nonstick frying pan add olive oil and beef, cook until brown. Do not overcook or beef goes tough
In a second pan, add olive oil, cabbage, celery, mushrooms, water chestnuts, soybean, vinegar and onion
Cook until entire mixture is hot and onions have softened
Add soy sauce, beef stock and cooked beef
Cook this mixture for 5-10 minutes

Add in sun dried tomatoes

alternatives.name: Tuna, Avocado and Tomato Recipe
ingredients: 150g pre-cooked cannellini or lima beans, rinsed and drained
alternatives.recipe:
Brush tuna steak with olive oil and grill or dry-fry about 3 mins on each side until outside is golden but inside still pink
Steam or microwave asparagus tips until just tender
Halve tomatoes, squeeze out pips then chop roughly
Arrange beans on serving plates with tomato, asparagus, and onion
Peel and slice avocado, add to plates
Mix together oil, lemon juice, most of oregano and seasoning
Pour most of dressing over salad, slice tuna and add
Drizzle remaining dressing and garnish with rest of oregano

alternatives.selected: The Bounce-Back Protein Smoothie Recipe

ingredients: 2 lbs boneless skinless chicken breast, cooked and shredded
1/4 cup reduced fat blue cheese dressing
alternatives.recipe:

Place a small lettuce leaf on each roll
Top with shredded buffalo chicken
Finish off with a drizzle of blue cheese dressing

ingredients: 2 Tbsp Maple Syrup or Raw Honey
alternatives.recipe:
In large bowl, combine oats, ground chia, hemp seeds, cacao powder, protein powder, cinnamon and sea salt
Add in almond butter, maple syrup, vanilla and optional mix-ins, mix until just combined
Scoop 1 tbsp of mixture and roll between hands into ball
Place on cookie sheet and repeat until all mixture is used (makes about 20-28)
Place cookie sheet in refrigerator for about 30 minutes to set
Store in airtight container in refrigerator for up to 1 week

alternatives.name: Banana Walnut Protein Bars Recipe
alternatives.recipe:

In a separate bowl, mash bananas and add egg whites and vanilla and stir
Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and combine until evenly mixed
Scoop mixture into a 9x9 Pyrex dish
Bake at 350 degrees F for 15 minutes
Allow to cool before cutting

alternatives.selected: doro wat - Ethiopian chicken curry

alternatives.name: Sega Wat (Spicy Ethiopian Beef Stew)
ingredients: 2 pounds boneless beef chuck, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
3 cups chunky pureed onions (pulse in food processor to form a chunky paste)
4 hard-boiled eggs, shelled and pierced all over with a fork 1/4 inch deep
alternatives.recipe:
Heat 3 tablespoons of niter kibbeh or butter in a heavy pot or Dutch oven. Add the onions and cook, covered, over low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the garlic, ginger, and 1 tablespoon niter kibbeh and continue to cook for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the berbere and the 2 remaining tablespoons of niter kibbeh and cook, covered, over low heat for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the beef, broth, salt and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low...
Adjust the seasonings, adding more berbere according to taste and heat preference. Add the hard-boiled eggs and simmer on low heat, covered, for another 10 to heat through. Half or quarter the eggs and arrange on the plates with the stew. Serve hot with Ethiopian injera, bread or rice.*This stew is even better the next day after the flavors have had more time to meld.

alternatives.name: Homemade High Protein White Cheddar Mac & Cheese Recipe
alternatives.recipe:

Pour pasta into an oven safe baking dish
Sprinkle with 2 tbsp of oat bran and remaining parmesan cheese
Bake until golden and bubbly

alternatives.recipe:
Combine all sauce ingredients in a bowl
Heat in microwave for 30-45 seconds and mix well
Cook pasta according to directions
Toss cooked pasta, bean sprouts, shredded chicken, and sauce together
Evenly divide between 2 plates
Top with roasted peanuts and fresh chives if desired

alternatives.name: High Protein Balsamic Steak & Pasta Salad Recipe
ingredients: 8oz high protein pasta (Banza), cooked and drained
Garlic powder, salt and pepper to taste
alternatives.recipe:
Slice steak into thin strips and grill until desired doneness
Toss together cooked pasta, asparagus, tomato, balsamic, and seasonings
Add in cooked steak and goat cheese
Toss gently
Serve immediately or store in a sealed container

alternatives.recipe: Preheat oven to 350 F. Blend all ingredients together. Pour into 2 greased ramekins. Sprinkle cinnamon on top. Bake for 20-25 minutes.

ingredients: 4 medium white or sweet potatoes, cut as desired
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 425 degrees
Coat oven safe pan with nonstick spray
Add potato slices to pan
Bake for approximately 20 minutes
While potatoes are baking, boil chicken until cooked through
Shred cooked chicken
Toss chicken with sriracha sauce
Remove fries from oven
Top with shredded chicken and cheese
Place back in oven about 6-7 minutes until cheese melts
Top with chives if desired

alternatives.name: Coconut Cashew Keto Fried Chicken Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Add the cashews into a food processor and pulse until coarse dust is formed. Add the coconut flakes, garlic, salt, paprika, and parsley. Pulse once again to combine. Transfer to a medium bowl.
In a separate bowl mix the egg, coconut milk, and water mixture. Mix together by whipping with a fork or with a hand blender until fully incorporated. Add a pinch of salt and black pepper.
Coat chicken by soaking first in the egg-coconut milk mixture. Dip chicken in the egg mixture followed then by cashew mixture, fully coating both sides of each piece and shaking off any excess. Transfer to a holding plate until all chicken pieces are fully coated.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat, and add the coconut and avocado oil and allow to heat for 1-2 minutes. Carefully add the breaded chicken to the skillet using tongs by placing the chicken away from you to avoid hot oil from splashing and burning you. Cook until browned on each side and warmed through (about 3-4 minutes per side).

alternatives.name: Joe Ohrablo's Protein Oatmeal Pancakes Recipe
ingredients: 20 grams of carbs from fruit (banana, blueberries or strawberries)
alternatives.recipe:
Mix all ingredients into a pancake batter, adding a tiny bit of water to make it easy to mix
Spray nonstick pan with cooking spray
Cook until brown on each side
Throw on cinnamon for extra taste
Top with sugar free syrup if desired

alternatives.name: Easy Bake Chorizo & Veggie Quiche Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees
Coat 6 large muffin cups with nonstick spray
Heat a skillet over medium heat
Cook chorizo, onion and shredded potato
Whisk together eggs, egg whites, cottage cheese, salt and pepper
Add meat, onion, potato and broccoli to eggs
Evenly divide among 6 cups
Bake for 40-45 minutes
Allow to cool then gently remove from mold

alternatives.name: Cinnamon Chip Caramel Protein Bars Recipe
ingredients: 4 scoops vanilla caramel whey protein powder
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Line a 9x13 inch pan with parchment paper
Combine all dry ingredients in a bowl (protein, oats, cinnamon and salt)
Mix together all wet ingredients (milk, almond butter, honey and extract)
Combine wet and dry ingredients
Stir in cinnamon chips
Pour into baking dish
Bake for approximately 15 minutes
Remove from oven and allow to cool (bars will finish setting)
Slice into desired size bars
Store in a sealed container

alternatives.name: Triple Chocolate Chip Deep Dish Protein Cookie Recipe
ingredients: Optional toppings: ice cream, additional chocolate peanut butter for drizzling
alternatives.recipe:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F
Combine all ingredients except chocolate chips in a bowl
Using an electric mixer, mix well
Gently fold in chocolate chips
Pour batter into an 8 inch oven safe skillet (cast iron skillet works best)
Bake for approximately 20 minutes or until top is golden
Allow to sit 5-10 minutes to finish cooking
Top with ice cream and additional chocolate peanut butter if desired

alternatives.name: Swedish Beef Patties With Onions Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
Mash the potatoes and mix with the ground beef
Add salt, pepper and water, work the meat mixture until smooth and shape into patties
Heat a skillet with 1 tbsp butter, add the onions and cook over moderate heat until golden brown
Transfer onions to a platter and keep hot
Melt remaining butter in skillet and cook the patties over moderate heat until brown on both sides and cooked throughout
Serve patties with sauteed onions and vegetables of your choice

alternatives.recipe:

alternatives.name: Doro Wat (Ethiopian Chicken Stew)
alternatives.recipe:
In a large pot over medium-low heat, add the niter kibbeh and allow it to melt.
Add the chopped onions, garlic, and ginger, and cook until caramelized.
Add the berbere spice, smoked paprika, black pepper, cumin, and salt. Stir for 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the chicken stock, add the tomato paste, and chicken thighs.
Cook for 30-40 minutes or till the chicken is tender.
Add in the boiled eggs and simmer for 10 mins on low heat.
Taste for spices & adjust.

alternatives.name: Beef Chop Suey Recipe
alternatives.recipe:
In a large nonstick frying pan add olive oil and beef, cook until brown. Do not overcook or beef goes tough
In a second pan, add olive oil, cabbage, celery, mushrooms, water chestnuts, soybean, vinegar and onion
Cook until entire mixture is hot and onions have softened
Add soy sauce, beef stock and cooked beef
Cook this mixture for 5-10 minutes
